title: Awfis is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Awfis is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!
